message:
bd-ml2r.11.2: add FNX E2E scenario tests + bless layout checksum

Add comprehensive E2E test suite for FNX integration scenarios:
- Baseline tests (FNX disabled, native engine only)
- Advisory mode tests with centrality class validation
- Fallback scenario tests for graceful degradation
- Pathological input stress tests (deep chains, wide graphs)
- Evidence capture tests for timing metrics and node/edge counts
- Mode switching consistency tests

Also update cycle_feedback layout checksum after upstream change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
